subcodes.first_line: O tested believer! Though thy name was Ghulam-'Ali, when subjected to trials thou didst emerge like pure gold in the crucible [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومن ممتحن نامت غلامعلی بود چون مورد امتحان گشتی و مانند زر خالص در بوته
subcodes.subjects: @idle fancies; lust and passion, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @Imam Husayn, @martyrs and martyrdom
